nodes.summary_zh: Intent→Plan→Context→Act→Observe→Adjust→Stop/Escalate。每步各有要求：意图需机器可验证 DoD，观察需快速反馈信号，停止需确定性闸门。
nodes.summary_en: Intent→Plan→Context→Act→Observe→Adjust→Stop/Escalate. Each step has a requirement: intent needs a machine-verifiable DoD, observe needs a fast feedback signal, stop needs a deterministic gate.

nodes.summary_zh: Anthropic 推荐的四阶段：Explore（计划模式只读）→ Plan（详细实现计划）→ Implement（对照计划编码）→ Commit。trivial 修复可跳过计划模式。
nodes.summary_en: Anthropic's recommended four phases: Explore (read-only plan mode) → Plan (a detailed implementation plan) → Implement (code while verifying against the plan) → Commit. Plan mode adds overhead and can be skipped for trivial fixes.

nodes.summary_zh: 直接跳到写代码会产出解决错误问题的代码；用计划模式把探索与执行分开，是对抗「勤奋但目标错」失败的结构性防御。
nodes.summary_en: Letting the agent jump straight to coding can produce code that solves the wrong problem; using plan mode to separate exploration from execution is the structural defense against the diligent-but-wrong-goal failure.

nodes.summary_zh: 适合小而清晰、信号明确的任务（typecheck、单个失败测试）：尝试→验证→失败则最小修复→再验证。失败模式：撞墙式机械重试同一修复，需封顶轮数并在重复失败时换策略。
nodes.summary_en: For small, crisp tasks with a clear signal (typecheck, one failing test): try → verify → on fail apply a minimal fix → re-verify. Failure mode: head-banging mechanical retries of the same fix — cap iterations and force a strategy change on repeat failure.

nodes.summary_zh: 适合中等复杂任务：先计划→分步执行→每步验证→汇总。失败模式：初始计划可能错误，必须允许循环中途修订计划。
nodes.summary_en: For medium-complexity tasks: plan first, execute in small steps, verify each step, then summarize. Failure mode: the initial plan may be wrong, so the loop must allow plan revision mid-flight.

nodes.summary_zh: 适合根因未知：广泛调查（日志、近期 diff、控制台、复现）→定位→最小修复→加回归测试。失败模式：没有好日志时会消耗大量时间——循环没有眼睛。
nodes.summary_en: For unknown root cause: broad investigation (logs, recent diffs, console, repro) → localize → minimal fix → add a regression test. Failure mode: burns large time without good logs — the loop has no eyes.

nodes.summary_zh: 适合 PR 质量/正确性：implementer 产出 diff→独立 reviewer 在全新上下文中批评→implementer 修复→再审。失败模式：reviewer 过度报告导致过度工程，也可能漏掉真实问题，关键代码仍需人审。
nodes.summary_en: For PR quality/correctness: an implementer produces a diff, a separate reviewer critiques it in a fresh context, the implementer fixes, then re-review. Failure mode: the reviewer over-reports (over-engineering) and can still miss real issues — keep humans on critical code.

nodes.summary_zh: 适合高风险：agent 调查并给候选方案→人选方向→agent 实现→系统验证→人最终批准。失败模式：过早放权、人沦为橡皮图章。
nodes.summary_en: For high-risk work: the agent investigates and proposes options, the human chooses, the agent implements, the system verifies, the human gives final approval. Failure mode: premature delegation and the human becoming a rubber stamp.

nodes.title_zh: 闭合循环需要一个检查
nodes.title_en: A Closed Loop Needs a Check
nodes.summary_zh: 本库最被交叉印证的原则：给 agent 一个产出 pass/fail 的东西，循环就自己闭合——做工作、跑检查、读结果、迭代到通过。没有检查时『看起来完成了』是唯一信号，你就成了验证循环。
nodes.summary_en: The most cross-corroborated principle here: give the agent something that produces a pass or fail and the loop closes on its own — do the work, run the check, read the result, iterate until it passes. Without a check, 'looks done' is the only signal and you become the verification loop.

nodes.summary_zh: 从最快/最便宜到最丰富/最慢：lint→typecheck→单测→输出 diff→构建退出码→集成测试→截图比对→浏览器控制台→API 契约→DB 查询→日志→trace/metric→CI→评审→生产遥测。反馈越紧，输出越好。
nodes.summary_en: From fastest/cheapest to richest/slowest: lint→typecheck→unit→output-diff→build exit code→integration→screenshot diff→browser console→API contract→DB query→logs→trace/metric→CI→review→production telemetry. The tighter the feedback, the better the output.

nodes.summary_zh: 把 DoD 写成谓词而非散文：脚本能判 pass/fail 的验收（测试通过、类型检查通过、契约绿、diff 在限内）才能让自主安全。OpenAI 的循环「跑到客观标准满足为止」。
nodes.summary_en: Write the DoD as predicates, not prose: acceptance a script can evaluate to pass/fail (tests pass, type checks pass, contract green, diff within limits) is what makes autonomy safe. OpenAI's loop 'runs until objective criteria are met.'

nodes.summary_zh: 瓶颈已从写代码转向信任代码：agent 产出代码的速度超过任何团队的验证速度。于是 code review 变成布隆过滤器——一道快速闸门而非正确性来源。2025–2026 行业共识。
nodes.summary_en: The bottleneck moved from writing code to trusting it: agents produce code faster than any team can verify. So code review becomes a bloom filter — a fast gate, not the source of correctness. A 2025–2026 industry consensus.

nodes.title_zh: 生产可观测性循环（有争议）
nodes.summary_zh: Datadog 主张最外层循环：agent 生成→harness 验证→生产遥测验证→不匹配则精炼 harness 并重试，「没有可观测性，循环就没闭合」。争议：可观测性平台 vs harness 谁是控制层（2-1 分歧票）。
nodes.summary_en: Datadog argues the outermost loop: agent generates → harness verifies → production telemetry validates → mismatches refine the harness and retry; 'without observability, the loop is not closed.' Contested: observability platform vs harness as the control layer (2-1 split vote).

nodes.summary_zh: agent 朝错误目标努力工作，每轮放大错误——最贵的失败。防御：机器可验证的验收 + 分离规划与执行（先复述理解再动手）。
nodes.summary_en: The agent works hard toward the wrong target, amplifying the error every iteration — the most expensive failure. Defenses: machine-verifiable acceptance plus separating planning from execution (restate the understanding before acting).
